title: Command Center — UX spec and information architecture
summary: This feature delivery ratifies documentation-only UX authority for Command Center before any production React or API code lands. The implement stage aligned spec.md and ux-spec.md frontmatter, populated index.json with feature metadata and dual-anchor citations, and confirmed every Engineering Spec acceptance…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human acceptance, SDK advances to complete and delegates close-artifacts archival to librarian.
review.spec_contracts_note: Two embedded llm-judge UX contract blocks in ux-spec.md evaluated manually; no contracts.index.json under feature folder.
intake.human_approval_note: Supervisor ship ratification at 2026-06-08T09:30:00Z with human_ratified_diff true; staged diff limited to spec.md, ux-spec.md, and index.json.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
